cli.help.title: SOBA Agent — local-first engineering agent
cli.help.description: Local-first engineering agent with Project Memory, bounded tools, verification, and proof receipts.
cli.help.modes:
Modes:
  soba "prompt"               One-shot: execute a single prompt
  soba init                   First-run setup/checks
  soba -i                     Interactive REPL mode
  soba -c                     Continue the most recent session
  soba -r                     Interactive session selection
  soba -s <session-id>        Resume a specific session
cli.help.optionsDetail:
Options:
  -m, --model <model>         Override the default model
  -k, --api-key <key>         Override API key
      --base-url <url>        Override API base URL
      --lang <en|ru|zh>       Set interface language
      --theme <name>          TUI theme: graphite, ember, aurora, synthwave, paper, forest
      --budget <tokens>       Set token budget limit
      --max-output-tokens <n> Maximum tokens generated per response
      --context-window <n>    Model context window for compaction
      --max-agent-iterations <n>
                               Emergency model-invocation ceiling (0 = unlimited)
      --max-stalled-iterations <n>
                               No-progress tool iterations before recovery
      --max-run-minutes <n>    Maximum task duration (0 = unlimited)
      --bash-max-timeout-seconds <n>
                               Maximum timeout for bash tool calls
      --no-auto-compact       Disable proactive compaction triggers
      --no-session            Don't persist the session to disk
      --no-color              Disable ANSI colors
      --stream                Enable streaming output (default for -i)
      --no-stream             Disable streaming output
      --debug                 Write loop decision debug entries to session JSONL

  -h, --help                  Show this help message
  -v, --version               Show version number
cli.help.commandsDetail:
Interactive commands (REPL mode):
  /compact [instructions]     Manually compact the context
  /rewind [checkpoint-id]     List checkpoints or rewind
  /session                    Show session and context statistics
  /sessions ...               List, resume, close, or delete sessions
  /capsule [checkpoint-id]    List or inspect context capsules
  /capsule create <objective> Create portable capsule in .soba/capsules
  /capsule export <id> <path> Export checkpoint as .capsule.md
  /capsule load <path>        Load portable capsule as untrusted context
  /auto-compact [on|off]      Show or change proactive compaction
  /budget                     Show token budget usage
  /model <name>               Change the active model
  /lang <en|ru|zh>            Change interface language
  /theme <name>               Change TUI theme
  /queue                      Show, edit, or cancel queued messages
  /permissions                Show or change permission mode
  /skill ...                  Manage and inspect skills
  /skill:<name> [prompt]      Activate a skill and run a prompt
  /project-trust ...          Manage trust for project-local skills
  /clear                      Clear visible messages
  /exit                       Exit the REPL
  /help                       Show available commands

Proof commands (one-shot):
  soba prove                  Show the latest .soba/evidence proof
  soba prove --format markdown Render the latest proof as Markdown
  soba prove <path>           Show a specific .soba-proof.json file
  soba verify                 Validate the latest proof
  soba verify --format json   Print proof validation issues as JSON
  soba verify <path>          Validate a specific .soba-proof.json file
  soba explain-claim <claim>  Explain one claim with evidence references

Project Memory commands (one-shot):
  soba memory doctor         Inspect Project Memory health
  soba memory doctor --format json Print memory health as JSON
  soba memory doctor --format markdown Render memory health as Markdown
  soba memory stale          Show stale or broken memory receipts
  soba memory stale --format json Print stale memory receipts as JSON
  soba memory verify         Verify Project Memory health
  soba memory verify --format json Print memory verification as JSON
  soba memory explain <query> Explain matching memory receipts

Provider management (one-shot):
  soba provider list          List built-in and custom providers
  soba provider add <id>      Add a custom OpenAI-compatible provider (see `soba provider help`)
  soba provider remove <id>   Remove a custom provider
  soba provider show <id>     Print a provider definition as JSON
  soba provider use <id>      Switch the active selection
  soba provider help          Detailed provider-command help
cli.help.env:
Environment variables:
  SOBA_API_KEY                Default API key
  SOBA_MODEL                  Default model
  SOBA_BASE_URL               Default API base URL
  SOBA_LANG                   Default language (en/ru/zh)
  SOBA_THEME                  Default TUI theme
  SOBA_MAX_TOKENS             Maximum tokens generated per response
  SOBA_CONTEXT_WINDOW         Model context window for compaction
  SOBA_AUTO_COMPACT           Set false or 0 to disable proactive compaction
  SOBA_MAX_AGENT_ITERATIONS   Emergency model-invocation ceiling
  SOBA_MAX_STALLED_ITERATIONS No-progress tool iterations before recovery
  SOBA_MAX_RUN_MINUTES        Maximum task duration in minutes
  SOBA_BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_SECONDS Maximum timeout for bash tool calls
  NO_COLOR                    Disable ANSI colors
repl.greeting: SOBA Agent {version} — type your request or /help for commands.
repl.unknownCommand: Unknown command: {command}. Type /help for available commands.
repl.help:
Available commands:
  /compact [instructions] — compress context
  /rewind [checkpoint-id] — rewind to a checkpoint
  /session — show session info
  /budget — show token budget
  /model <name> — switch model
  /lang <en|ru|zh> — switch interface language
  /exit — quit

cli.provider.help.title: soba provider — manage custom LLM providers
cli.provider.help.subcommands:
Subcommands:
  list                     List built-in and custom providers (active marked with *)
  add <id> [flags]         Register a custom OpenAI-compatible provider
  remove <id>              Remove a custom provider (built-ins are immutable)
  show <id>                Print a provider definition as JSON
  use <id>                 Switch the active selection to a provider's default model
  help                     Show this help
cli.provider.help.addFlags:
add flags:
      --name <name>           Human-readable name (default = id)
      --base-url <url>        OpenAI-compatible base URL (required)
      --api-key-env <ENV>     Env var holding the API key (omit for keyless servers)
      --adapter <openai|anthropic>
                              Adapter id (default: openai)
      --default-model <id>    Default model id (must be in --model list)
      --model <id,name,contextWindow,maxOutput[,stream[,think]]>
                              Register a model. Repeat for multiple. Trailing
                              numeric fields are optional and default to
                              8192 / 4096 / true / false respectively.
      --from-file <path>      Load the full provider from a JSON file
      --set-active            Switch the active selection after add
cli.provider.help.examples:
Examples:
  soba provider list
  soba provider add my-llm --base-url https://api.example.com/v1 --api-key-env MY_LLM_KEY --default-model my-llm-7b --model my-llm-7b,"My LLM 7B",16384,8192
  soba provider add ollama-local --base-url http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 --default-model llama3 --model llama3,llama3
  soba provider add corp --from-file ./corp-provider.json --set-active
  soba provider use ollama-local
  soba provider remove my-llm
cli.provider.list.title: Providers (active: {active} / {model}):
cli.provider.error.duplicate: Provider "{id}" already exists. Use `soba provider remove` first or pick a different id.
cli.provider.error.builtinImmutable: Provider "{id}" is built-in and cannot be removed. Built-ins are always listed even without an API key.
cli.provider.error.unknownId: Provider "{id}" not found. Run `soba provider list` to see available providers.
cli.provider.error.noModels: Provider "{id}" must declare at least one model via --model or --from-file.
cli.provider.error.defaultModelMissing: Default model "{model}" is not in the model list for provider "{id}".
cli.provider.error.modelFlagEmpty: Model flag at index {index} is empty.
cli.provider.error.jsonShape: Provider JSON must include {id, name, baseUrl, models[], defaultModel} with valid types.
cli.help.soundFlags:
Sound Options:
  --sound-enabled                Enable sound notifications
  --no-sound                      Disable sound notifications
  --sound-volume <0..1>           Volume level (default: 0.7)
  --sound-repeat                  Repeat sounds at interval until next event

Sound Environment Variables:
  SOBA_SOUND_ENABLED=true|false    Enable/disable sounds
  SOBA_SOUND_VOLUME=0.7            Volume level
  SOBA_SOUND_REPEAT=true|false     Enable repeat mode
